student-management-oop.overview:
Object-oriented student management with CRUD operations.

Features to build:
• Add Student
• Display Student
• Update Student
• Delete Student

Requirements:
• Use classes and objects
• Use constructors
• Apply encapsulation with getters/setters

Bonus:
• Search by roll number
• Sort by name
student-management-oop.explanation: Student Management System (OOP Version) is a console Java program implementing: Add Student, Display Student, Update Student, Delete Student. Use Scanner, loops, and conditionals. Build one feature at a time and test each step.
student-management-oop.sampleOutput:
Student Management System (OOP Version)
Object-oriented student management with CRUD operations.

bank-account-system.overview:
OOP-based bank account with transactions and balance tracking.

Features to build:
• Create Account
• Deposit
• Withdraw
• Balance
• Transaction Summary

Requirements:
• Use constructors
• Use methods
• Use getters and setters

Bonus:
• Multiple account types
• Interest calculation
bank-account-system.explanation: Bank Account System is a console Java program implementing: Create Account, Deposit, Withdraw, Balance, Transaction Summary. Use Scanner, loops, and conditionals. Build one feature at a time and test each step.
bank-account-system.sampleOutput:
Bank Account System
OOP-based bank account with transactions and balance tracking.

library-management.overview:
Manage books with borrow and return functionality using OOP.

Features to build:
• Add Books
• Borrow Book
• Return Book
• Display Books

Requirements:
• Use objects and constructors
• Apply encapsulation

Bonus:
• Fine calculation for late returns
library-management.explanation: Library Management System is a console Java program implementing: Add Books, Borrow Book, Return Book, Display Books. Use Scanner, loops, and conditionals. Build one feature at a time and test each step.
library-management.sampleOutput:
Library Management System
Manage books with borrow and return functionality using OOP.

employee-management.overview:
Employee records with department and salary management.

Features to build:
• Employee Details
• Salary
• Department
• Experience
• Display Information

Requirements:
• Encapsulate employee data
• Use proper class design

Bonus:
• Department-wise filtering
employee-management.explanation: Employee Management System is a console Java program implementing: Employee Details, Salary, Department, Experience, Display Information. Use Scanner, loops, and conditionals. Build one feature at a time and test each step.
employee-management.sampleOutput:
Employee Management System
Employee records with department and salary management.

vehicle-registration.overview:
Register and manage vehicle records with owner details.

Features to build:
• Register Vehicle
• Owner Details
• Vehicle Information
• Display Records

Requirements:
• Separate classes for Vehicle and Owner
• Use encapsulation

Bonus:
• Search by registration number
vehicle-registration.explanation: Vehicle Registration System is a console Java program implementing: Register Vehicle, Owner Details, Vehicle Information, Display Records. Use Scanner, loops, and conditionals. Build one feature at a time and test each step.
vehicle-registration.sampleOutput:
Vehicle Registration System
Register and manage vehicle records with owner details.
